creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->feedback

To submitter: Are you able to provide a full copy of the dmesg from the 
system?  It's impossible to tell from the snippet you've provided whether 
the problem is with the first or second ATA controller.  Also, can you 
check in the BIOS for any ATA-related options (like changing to AHCI mode) 
and see if they make a difference?
